cenas.dalle_prompt: A dog is sitting in front of a person. The person is holding a treat in their closed fist, near the dog's chest. The dog is sniffing the hand. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: Static shot, focusing on the starting position and the dog's interest in the hidden treat.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The person gently tickles the back of the dog's paw. The dog instinctively lifts its paw slightly in reaction. The person immediately says 'Sim!' and gives the treat. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A close-up on the paw, showing the gentle tickle and the resulting lift. A sparkle effect highlights the reward moment.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The person now presents their open palm and says 'Pata'. The dog, anticipating the sequence, lifts its paw and places it in the person's hand. Jackpot reward. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The camera focuses on the open palm as the dog's paw comes into frame and rests on it. A 'Jackpot!' animation celebrates the success.

cenas.dalle_prompt: A split screen showing the difference: 'Toca Aqui' (High Five - vertical tap) and 'Pata' (Shake - paw rests in hand). Clear visual distinction. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The two actions are shown side-by-side, with text labels clearly identifying each trick.

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final shot of a person formally shaking their dog's paw, as if closing a business deal. Both look very serious and professional, but in a funny way. Text overlay: 'Pata: Um Acordo de Cavalheiros'. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A humorous, slow-motion shot of the formal handshake. The text appears in a classic, elegant serif font.
